title: Bokq'sPack
description: A clean 16x16 PvP texture pack with hand-drawn pixel art, custom items, and smooth visuals. Perfect for low-end PCs and fast-paced combat.
body:
Bokq’s — Clean & Minimalistic 16x16 PvP Texture Pack
Bokq’s is a lightweight, custom-made texture pack designed for PvP players who appreciate clean visuals and smooth gameplay. Built entirely from scratch in pixel art, this pack keeps the classic 16x16 resolution, while giving Minecraft a fresh and unique look.

🗡 Key Features:
🔥 Clean, minimalistic pixel style

⚔️ Custom PvP textures for swords, armor, golden apples, TNT, and more

🧱 Unique block textures that stay true to vanilla vibes

💻 Perfect for low-end PCs and PvP clients

📦 Compatibility:
Minecraft Version: 1.8.9+

Works on any version that supports standard resource packs

Fully functional without OptiFine (but looks even better with it)

🔧 In Development:
🌈 Gradient versions of PvP items (custom-colored TNT, golden apples, etc.)

🧪 Future 32x32 version with brand-new textures

Telegram channel: [https://t.me/Bokquu](https://t.me/Bokquu)

Bokq’s isn’t just a resource pack — it’s a personal pixel project. It’s completely free, made with passion and care as I continue to grow as a texture artist.
